summary.sosovalue: On April 20, 2026, SoSoValue generated substantial community buzz primarily around its EXP Real-User Verification tutorial, which users actively shared to assist friends in achieving higher percentages (15% quiz, 30% SoDEX activation, 60% on-chain) crucial for Season 2 airdrop eligibility. Discussions included speculation on a snapshot around April 24-28 and sharing Season 1 allocations to understand reward mechanics, with positive vibes on the project's growth and AI tools. Market 'flashes' on institutional ETF inflows, geopolitics like Hormuz Strait tensions, and trading setups further highlighted its utility, fostering bullish sentiment among enthusiasts.
summary.sodex: SoDEX mentions on April 20, 2026, were tied to SoSoValue's ecosystem, notably for boosting EXP verification to 30% via activation and further through trading, with users reporting small trades ($10-16) to reach 100%+. A key highlight was the successful completion of SoDEX maintenance in just 60 minutes, praised for engineering excellence. Sentiment remains positive as a seamless DEX integral to airdrop farming, though some users expressed trading challenges.
summary.ssi: No significant mentions found. A single Japanese community post referenced SSI alongside SoSoValue and SoDEX in an upcoming study session to analyze index components and market updates, suggesting niche interest without broader discussion.
